summary: Implemented rate limiting middleware for dashboard write API routes (debt-refinement-phase2 Task 3). Enhanced rate-limit.ts to return RateLimitResult interface with allowed, remaining, resetAt, limit fields. Updated api-response.ts rateLimited() to accept rate limit headers (X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset). Applied rate limiting to 3 write routes: config/route.ts (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE), models/route.ts (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE), models/transition/route.ts (POST). Rate limit: 10 requests per minute per IP. IP extraction from x-forwarded-for (first) or x-real-ip header. Returns 429 Too Many Requests with rate limit headers when limit exceeded. Added comprehensive rate-limit.test.ts with 10 unit tests (all passing). In-memory Map store with automatic cleanup every 60 seconds.
